prerequisites: A JobNimbus account with access to the Settings area to create API keys.
An Access Profile defined in JobNimbus that grants the API key the permissions it needs (JobNimbus recommends Full and Settings access).
An API key generated in JobNimbus, supplied to the connector's required api_key field.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: JobNimbus authenticates with a single API key. The key is sent in the HTTP Authorization header as 'Bearer <api_key>'. This maps to the connector's required api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Open the API settings in JobNimbus
setupSteps.body: Sign in to JobNimbus, click your profile icon or initials in the top right corner, and select Settings. From the Integration settings menu on the left, open the API tab.

setupSteps.title: Create a new API key
setupSteps.body: Click the New API Key button in the top right. Under the Description column, select a third-party software from the drop-down or type a custom name for the integration.

setupSteps.title: Assign an Access Profile
setupSteps.body: Assign an Access Profile to the API key to control its permissions. JobNimbus recommends an Access Profile with both Full and Settings access so the key can perform its functions. Save the API integration.

setupSteps.title: Copy the key into the connector
setupSteps.body: After saving, a key string appears in the Key column. Copy it and paste it into the connector's required api_key field. The connector uses it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header against the JobNimbus API at https://app.jobnimbus.com/api1/.

sources.title: How Do I Create an API Key? - JobNimbus Help Center
